conference.description: FACCON is a premier platform dedicated to advancing the science and artistry of facial aesthetics. Designed for medical professionals passionate about aesthetic medicine, FACCON brings together leading experts, innovators, and practitioners to exchange knowledge, showcase clinical excellence, and explore the latest advancements in aesthetic procedures.
conference.about: FACCON serves as a hub for cutting-edge learning, live demonstrations, and high-impact networking within the global aesthetic community.
conference.vision: FACCON aims to elevate the standards of aesthetic medicine by fostering education, innovation, and collaboration among aesthetic practitioners. Our goal is to create a global platform where doctors can refine their skills, learn advanced techniques, and stay ahead in the rapidly evolving field of facial aesthetics.

hero.headline: 2nd Edition Global Aesthetics Summit
hero.tagline: Join the most elite gathering of aestheticians, dental professionals, and industry pioneers. Unlock cutting-edge insights, master advanced techniques, and grow your network—all in one transformative event.
hero.follow_cta: Follow us on Instagram for speaker drops & schedules.

offerings.title: International Conferences
offerings.description: Large-scale aesthetic conferences that bring together renowned national and international faculty to share insights into the latest aesthetic technologies, clinical techniques, and treatment protocols.

offerings.title: Clinical Workshops
offerings.description: Hands-on workshops provide doctors with practical training in advanced aesthetic procedures including injectables, facial contouring, laser therapies, and regenerative treatments.

offerings.title: Live Demonstrations
offerings.description: Participants gain valuable exposure through live patient demonstrations conducted by expert practitioners, offering real-time learning and technique refinement.

offerings.title: Scientific Discussions
offerings.description: Evidence-based panel discussions, case presentations, and interactive sessions focusing on safety, ethics, and innovation in aesthetic medicine.

offerings.title: Networking Opportunities
offerings.description: An exceptional platform for doctors, aesthetic practitioners, and industry leaders to connect, collaborate, and build meaningful professional relationships.

offerings.title: FACCON Honours
offerings.description: Prestigious awards recognizing outstanding contributions, innovation, and clinical mastery within the aesthetic community.

why_attend: Learn from leading experts in aesthetic medicine
Elevate your practice to international standards
reference_benefits: Exclusive insights from global industry leaders
Live demos from top aesthetics professionals
Network with 500+ professionals & leaders in the industry
Stay ahead with the latest trends & technologies
Showcase your work and gain industry recognition
Discover business strategies to scale your aesthetics practice

event_2026.title: FACCON 2026
event_2026.description: FACCON continues to grow as one of India’s most anticipated aesthetic conferences, bringing together doctors from across the country and beyond for two days of intensive learning, innovation, and celebration of excellence in facial aesthetics.

sessions.name: Smart Aesthetics: Redefining Beauty with AI
Liquid Gold: Precision Fat Transfer Techniques
sessions.description: Elevate your clinical expertise by learning a procedure that blends artistry with surgical precision—delivering natural, elegant, and sustainable results.

sessions.name: The Gaze Redefined
sessions.description: Unlock the science behind brighter, younger-looking eyes—an exclusive deep dive into modern blepharoplasty.

sessions.name: Facial Accents: Science of Surgical Dimples
sessions.description: Sculpted smiles—an artistic approach to precision dimple creation.

sessions.name: Precision Under Pressure: BLS for Injectors

social_proof.body: 1000+ people across the globe have experienced FACCON and transformed their career & business.
